name: WANTED: A Lazy Trouble Witch
desc:
Target 1 Spellcaster monster you control; add 1 level 6 or higher Spellcaster monster with different Attribute from your Deck to your hand, or if you targeted a level 6 or higher Spellcaster monster, you can add 1 level 5 or lower Spellcaster monster with different Attribute from your Deck to your hand instead.
During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY and target 1 Spellcaster monster in your banishment; return that targeted card to the GY.
You can only use each effect of "WANTED: A Lazy Trouble Witch" once per turn.
